narrative:
Sycamore Community City Sd city school district has 27,912 registered voters, with 55.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 25.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.2%, a clear Republican lean of 6.4 percentage points. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean +4.8% D−R vs -16.9% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
